escalation.delta: N/A - No previous escalation score available
escalation.rationale: Active US-Israel war on Iran with Strait of Hormuz closure, fresh Israeli strikes on Tehran, Iran threatening Gulf mining, and Trump considering ground invasion.

ticker_items: Israel launches renewed strikes on Tehran infrastructure
Iran threatens to mine Persian Gulf if US launches ground invasion
Trump delays threat to obliterate Iran's energy sites for 5 days
Strait of Hormuz closure creates global energy crisis
Iran denies firing missiles at Diego Garcia base

middle_east.description: Israeli forces conducted fresh strikes on Tehran as conflict continues.
IDF strikes killed three Palestinians in Gaza refugee camp.
Israeli strikes killed five in Lebanon as defense minister orders village destruction.
IDF announces new wave of airstrikes against regime infrastructure in Tehran.
IDF strikes kill three Palestinians in Gaza refugee camp.
Israeli strikes kill five people in Lebanon as part of expanding assault.

claimed_totals.claim: US-Israel attacks on Iran total deaths

ukraine.text: Very bad feeling about Iran war causing global shortage of air defence missiles
ukraine.speaker: Volodymyr Zelensky
ukraine.title: President of Ukraine

middle_east.text: Iran denies the long-range missile attack, which could change the calculus of the war for US allies.
middle_east.speaker: Esmaeil Baghaei
middle_east.title: Iranian spokesperson

middle_east.text: Good and productive talks with Iran could bring the conflict to an end soon
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

middle_east.text: Iran is ready to mine the entire Persian Gulf if the US launches a ground incursion
middle_east.speaker: Iranian officials
middle_east.title: Government representatives

observers.description: Chancellor Merz expressed gratitude for Trump's decision to delay strikes on Iranian power plants. Germany continues diplomatic efforts to de-escalate the crisis while maintaining support for Israel.
QatarEnergy declared force majeure on some LNG contracts due to production disruptions from the Iran war. The move highlights Gulf states' economic vulnerability to regional conflict escalation.

IEA members agreed to release 400 million barrels of oil from strategic reserves to counter the global energy crisis. The organization warns this crisis could be worse than the 1970s oil shocks due to the Strait of Hormuz closure.

Saudi Arabia's East-West pipeline has become crucial for global oil flow as an alternative to the blocked Strait of Hormuz. The 1,200-kilometer pipeline is now rerouting millions of barrels daily to prevent complete supply disruption.

Former French Ambassador to US Gerard Araud argues Europe is right to avoid the US-Israeli war on Iran. Trump is reportedly asking for European help but facing resistance from allies who view the conflict as unnecessary.

financial.notes: Gas prices across the US have increased by $1 per gallon in less than a month due to the Iran conflict and Strait of Hormuz closure.

update_log.text: Iran denies claims it fired missiles at Diego Garcia US base, calling it a false flag attack
Iran names Mohammad Bagher Zolghadr as successor to security chief killed in US-Israeli attack
Trump postpones strikes against Iranian power plants and energy infrastructure for five days
Israel launches fresh wave of airstrikes against regime infrastructure in Tehran
IEA members agree to release 400 million barrels from strategic oil reserves
QatarEnergy declares force majeure on LNG contracts due to Iran war disruptions.
Iran denies claims of missile attack on Diego Garcia base.
Israel launches fresh strikes on Tehran as conflict enters day 23.
Trump backs down from 48-hour ultimatum to destroy Iran's power infrastructure.
IEA members agree to release 400 million barrels from strategic oil reserves.
